findings.observation: Llama3.2-vision:11b achieves 38.08% on ScienceQA in Standard mode. Published benchmarks for this model show 60-75%+ on ScienceQA. All three models cluster at 38-41% in Standard mode, suggesting inference setup issues.
findings.severity: major — inflates reported improvement from ~107% to potentially 5-20%

findings.observation: False historical answers (83.33%) outperform H-GIVR (78.90%). The paper interprets this as showing false answers cannot mislead, but does not explain why False > H-GIVR.
findings.severity: major — undermines the causal mechanism claimed for historical context

evidence_sources: Standard published benchmarks for Llama3.2-11B-Vision on ScienceQA

verdict_state.rationale: Interesting inference-time framework but experimental validity concerns are major — the low baselines may mean the improvement is smaller than claimed, and Table 1 paradox is unexplained.
